title: Classify future-dated events as FUTURE_SCHEDULED (or expand registry window); eliminate no_registry_match log noise
objective: Eliminate spurious no_registry_match log spam for future-day events by classifying them separately at parse time (or, alternatively, expanding the registry window if bot actually trades pre-game).
forbidden_actions: Change matching logic for same-day events
required_work: 1. Verify whether the bot trades pre-game (read bot_core.py + core/risk.py entry gate).
2. Choose option (a) registry window expand vs (b) FUTURE_SCHEDULED classifier — default (b).
4. Replace per-event verbose registry-dump log with end-of-loop summary + single future-events line.
acceptance_criteria: Future-day events no longer log no_registry_match with full registry dump
Summary log line reflects new classification count
No change in matching for same-day events
verification: Confirm same-day match counts unchanged across a restart
Show bot entry-gate finding (does it trade pre-game?)
